ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Indicates whether seasonality is assumed in the forecast */,
  "intervention" TEXT /* Type of intervention scenario (e.g., Worst case, Best case) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the forecast is applicable */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "total_hospital_beds_max" REAL /* Maximum total hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "non_icu_beds_max" REAL /* Maximum non-ICU hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "icu_beds_max" REAL /* Maximum ICU bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "ventilators_max" REAL /* Maximum ventilator needs (prevalence) */,
  "total_hospital_beds_mean" REAL /* Mean total hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "non_icu_beds_mean" REAL /* Mean non-ICU hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "icu_beds_mean" REAL /* Mean ICU bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "ventilators_mean" REAL /* Mean ventilator needs (prevalence) */,
  "total_hospital_beds_min" REAL /* Minimum total hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "non_icu_beds_min" REAL /* Minimum non-ICU hospital bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "icu_beds_min" REAL /* Minimum ICU bed needs (prevalence) */,
  "ventilators_min" REAL /* Minimum ventilator needs (prevalence) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., confidence interval) */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the forecast (e.g., historical records, real-time data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_intervention FOREIGN KEY ("intervention") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_seasonality FOREIGN KEY ("seasonality") REFERENCES seasonalities ("seasonality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area served by the location */,
  "healthcare_capacity" INTEGER /* Total healthcare capacity (number of beds, ventilators) at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention scenario */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention scenario (e.g., Worst case, Best case) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Factor representing the impact of the intervention on resource demand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonalities" (
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonality status */,
  "seasonality_status" TEXT /* Seasonality status (e.g., Assumed, Not assumed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonality status */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Start month of the seasonality period */,
  "end_month" INTEGER /* End month of the seasonality period */,
  "seasonal_impact" REAL /* Factor representing the impact of seasonality on resource demand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, public health official, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention scenario */,
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seasonality status */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., seasonal, pandemic) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the scenario */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_scenarios_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_scenarios_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_scenarios_seasonality_id FOREIGN KEY ("seasonality_id") REFERENCES seasonalities ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_forecast_data" (
  "scenario_forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario-forecast link */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast scenario */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast data */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast within the scenario */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast within the scenario */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the forecast within the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_forecast_data_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES forecast_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_forecast_data_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_data ("forecast_id")
)
